title: stachys glandulifera
intro: Stachys glandulifera, also known as Himalayan hedgemint or glandular hedgemint, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family and is native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Stachys glandulifera include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems like indigestion and bloating. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal preparations like tinctures, ointments, and essential oils to harness its medicinal properties.
